# PHIL.115 ? Outcome Over Output

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** customer_focus
**Subcategory:** outcome_over_output
**Domain:** CUSTOMER_FOCUS
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Measure customer outcomes achieved, not features shipped

## Application
Define success by customer results, track outcome metrics, validate value delivery, iterate on impact

philosophy, customer-focus, outcome-over-output
